name: marp-agent-mcp
description: Marp slide generation MCP server with preview UI

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && bun build server.ts --outdir dist --target node && bun build main.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --external "./server.js" --banner "#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run build && pnpm run serve
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run build 1>&2 && pnpm run serve:stdio
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "pnpm run watch" "pnpm run serve"
